nodes.context: Mostly Puerto Rican and African American street gang started in Hunts Point, Bronx, late 1960s, active in 1970s.
Rival gang involved in running battles with Savage Skulls.
Rival gang involved in running battles with Savage Skulls; also used Nazi symbolism.
Rival gang involved in running battles with Savage Skulls.

edges.evidence_quote: The gang ... was also involved in a number of running battles with rival gangs, including the Seven Immortals, Savage Nomads, and Dirty Dozen.
edges.context: Savage Skulls had running battles with Seven Immortals.
